title: fagraea eymae
intro: Fagraea eymae, also known as the fragrant frangipani or Eymae frangipani, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for hypertension and other cardiovascular issues. Fagraea eymae has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
